brand.name: Shadrasa
brand.industry: Homemade Malenadu Food Products from Karnataka, India
brand.target_audience: Premium FMCG buyers, organic food lovers, distributors, retailers

archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury)

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0a331e]
rules.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#0a331e]
rules.labels: text-xs md:text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#6b3e1f]

grid_patterns.two_col: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 lg:gap-24 items-center

surface_styles.cards: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#6b3e1f]/10 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgb(15,77,46,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
surface_styles.buttons_primary: bg-[#0f4d2e] hover:bg-[#0a331e] text-white rounded-full font-semibold transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-3
surface_styles.buttons_secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#d4a017] text-[#d4a017] hover:bg-[#d4a017] hover:text-white rounded-full font-semibold transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-3

animations.scroll: Use Lenis library for premium momentum smooth scrolling.
animations.reveal: Use framer-motion for fade-up, viewport intersecting triggers, and staggered children in bento grids.
animations.parallax: Use framer-motion useScroll to shift background positions slightly on the hero and heritage sections.
animations.counters: Animate numbers counting up on scroll (IntersectionObserver) in the Trust section.

hero_slideshow.description: Cinematic macro shot of raw mangoes and traditional spices

about.description: High-end cinematic photograph of a traditional Indian village kitchen

heritage_parallax.description: Aerial view of misty hills and lush greenery in Kerala/Karnataka

video_poster.description: Fog covers the lush green hills

components_and_sections.name: Global Utilities
components_and_sections.instructions: Implement floating WhatsApp button fixed at bottom-right (z-50) and a Scroll-to-Top button (bottom-left, appearing after scroll). Install @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react for high-end icons.

components_and_sections.name: Navbar
components_and_sections.instructions: Sticky header (z-50). Crystal glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80). Ensure text links are dark green. Include Logo on left and 'Contact Us' CTA.

components_and_sections.name: Hero Section
components_and_sections.instructions: Full viewport height (min-h-screen). Background slider using framer-motion/Swiper cycling through `hero_slideshow` array. OVERLAY: MUST use a dark gradient or bg-black/40 so white text is readable. Text centered: Large 'Welcome to Shadrasa', subtext 'Bringing Authentic Malenadu Taste to Every Home'. CTAs: Explore Products & Contact Us. Scroll down indicator at bottom.

components_and_sections.name: About + Mission/Vision
components_and_sections.instructions: Two-column organic layout. Left side: About image (traditional_kitchen) with subtle rounded corners. Right side: Playfair Display heading, rich text paragraph. Use small accent blocks or custom list items for Mission and Vision.

components_and_sections.name: Why Choose Us
components_and_sections.instructions: Bento grid with 8 cards: Homemade with Care, Traditional Recipes, Premium Ingredients, Hygienic Preparation, No Artificial Preservatives, Trusted Quality, Rich Taste, Customer Satisfaction. Each card should have a soft background, border, an elegant icon (gold color), and title.

components_and_sections.name: Products Section
components_and_sections.instructions: Showcase two products side-by-side or stacked in a premium way. 1) Jeerige Midi Maavu Pickle, 2) Pure Natural Honey. Use Shadcn Dialog (Modal) for the 'Enquire Now' form. Images should be prominent, wrapped in a card with 'Premium Badge' floating on the image corner.

components_and_sections.name: Gallery
components_and_sections.instructions: 4x4 or masonry bento grid of lifestyle/ingredient images. Hovering on images should trigger a slight scale-up (group-hover:scale-105).

components_and_sections.name: Video / Heritage Parallax
components_and_sections.instructions: Full-width section with the `heritage_parallax` image. Background attachment fixed or use framer-motion. Add a large elegant Play button icon in the center for 'Experience Shadrasa'.

components_and_sections.name: Trust Counters
components_and_sections.instructions: 4 columns showing stats: Happy Customers, Homemade Quality, Natural Ingredients, Traditional Recipes. Numbers animate on scroll. Gold accents.

components_and_sections.name: Business Opportunity
components_and_sections.instructions: CTA section for Dealers/Retailers. Dark Green background (bg-[#0f4d2e]) with gold text to create a 'break' in the page flow. High contrast, luxurious feel.

components_and_sections.name: Testimonials
components_and_sections.instructions: 3 review cards with subtle shadow. Quote icons and 5-star icons in golden yellow.

components_and_sections.name: Contact & Footer
components_and_sections.instructions: Grid layout. Left: Contact form (Name, Email, Phone, Message) using customized Shadcn inputs. Right: Phone (+91 7338542117), Email (shadrasa.india@gmail.com), Karnataka India address, and Map placeholder block. Footer with quick links and logo on deep green background.

components_and_sections.name: Admin Dashboard
components_and_sections.instructions: Separate route (e.g., /admin). Switch to a more functional, high-contrast Swiss layout (Archetype 4). Sidebar nav. Use Shadcn tables to display submitted Enquiries and Contact forms. Clean white background with dark text for high legibility.

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g. data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='product-enquire-modal').
